name: notification-ai
description: In-memory notification system with channels, priorities, and history. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: send_notification
tools.description: Send a notification with title, message, channel (info/warning/error/success/system), and priority (low/normal/high/urgent).

tools.name: list_notifications
tools.description: List notifications for a recipient, optionally filtered by channel and read status.

tools.name: mark_read
tools.description: Mark notifications as read. Provide comma-separated IDs or set mark_all=true.

tools.name: get_preferences
tools.description: Get or update notification preferences. Update with JSON: {"channels": {"info": true, "warning": false}, "max_per_hour": 30}.
